item.title: Worth a look
item.dc:creator: madman434

item.title: Rejection is tough…
item.description: EDIT: Honest to god tears from the overwhelming support. You guys are the best. Signed out for a bit and came back to all these amazing comments. Such an amazing community. Thank you! EDIT 2: a lot of questions about what series it is. In a different context I’d love to share which series it is, but it’s very independent release and an independent project can be fragile so just want to be careful. I still love the series! :)
item.dc:creator: frackinxcylon

item.title: I freaking did it, guys!
item.description: I never thought I could do it! I've been drinking beer here and there and way too much/often for years. I tried many times tapering off, but just ended up picking up my old habits. I ruined everything. My wife cheated on me. I'm getting a divorce, I'm moving out of the house and we've been fighting over custody. I told myself that I have to be really careful with drinking too much in this time of my life - then I found out that my ex is pregnant. At this point it started escalating - I drank too much and started spiraling. I realized what was happening, and I sought help immediately. Everything is on the line! I tapered for 4 days, then figured 'f this' and quit cold turkey! I'm on day 8 now and I'm feeling so damn good, despite everything that has happened lately! It's been a blessing for me, and I'm genuinely happy! I promise you all this - if I can do it, so can you!!! Let me know if you're struggling and in need of help/support! I effing did it!!
item.dc:creator: Ohyesireallydidthat

item.title: How did I not know this!!!
item.description: As a side note: Calling all cat lovers to vote! ❤️ Where people vote: americasfavpet.com/2024/sir-908c I am trying to win money for medical expenses, as I have been ill recently. I had influenza B and that transitioned into double pneumonia. Which I am still fighting! Thank you in advance!!

Mine is a cross between the two
ye
creechur
I wish I had a basement now.
JOKES ON YOU, I ALREADY REGRET THAT!
ye
P I L K
I get it Abigail, when I see the shiny stones at the gift shop I wanna eat them too.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have. Wednesday meme dump
item.description:
1. She *PINES* ova him
2
3. Catception
4. Do it!
5
6
7
8
9. "Stunt Jump Failed"
10
11. I don't know about you guys, but I really like my PS4. No plans to switch to 5 anytime soon.
12
13. I was there Gandalf... okay... I watched on VHS and not in theaters and it was STILL EPIC
14
15. If you made it to the end I want to share with you that aside from dumping on Imgur I also make my own game. It's inspired by The Stanley Parable and the narrator has a touch of GladOs. If you like the humor of the dump, be sure to check out the game. Currently it's part of Steam Next Fest: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S Please wishlist and also what do you think is behind that door?

item.title: Has anybody else experienced something like this?
item.description: ...not so much just COVID denial, but recently acquired COVID denial? Like, IDEK how to handle this. They get mad just talking about it, and it's insane.
